_comment: Model router for 15Gi RAM nodes (fnet1, fnet7). Tight RAM — avoids gemma4:e4b as default high-tier to prevent OOM. Use 'flagship' profile to force gemma4 when explicitly needed.

_models.gemma4:e4b: 9.6GB disk, 8.0B params, 131072 ctx, tools+vision+thinking — TIGHT on 15Gi
_models.qwen3.5:9b: 6.6GB disk, 9.65B params, 262144 ctx, tools+vision+thinking — NOT viable on 15Gi (needs 31Gi+)

rules.reason: Complex planning needs best available local model
Lightweight tasks use the fast model

project-blueprint._comment: Route low-capacity models to linear scripts (no cross-ref navigation)
project-blueprint._validated: 2026-05-22: ALL local models fail decomposed. Linear forced for all tiers.

low.reason: ALL models fail decomposed (validated 2026-05-22). Linear scripts forced.

medium.reason: ALL models fail decomposed (validated 2026-05-22). Linear scripts forced.

high.reason: ALL models fail decomposed (validated 2026-05-22). Linear scripts forced.

_forceLinearReason: Validation testing proved ALL local models (qwen3.5:4b, qwen3:8b, gemma4:e4b) fail decomposed approach. Linear scripts validated as safer across all tiers. Threshold set above maximum local model context window to force linear for all local models.
